# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 26, 2026, focused on expanding the ecosystem's payment capabilities. A new pull request was opened to integrate multi-chain agent-to-agent (A2A) payment functionality into the registry.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Multi-chain Payment Integration:** [#352](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/352) Add @algovoi/plugin-elizaos — multi-chain A2A payments (7 chains). This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None*

## NEW ISSUES
*None*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None*
